zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Greystoke於1353年10月18日出生在英國越可爾拉文斯沃斯時，他的父親William Greystoke32歲，母親Joan Fitzhugh15歲。他於大約1381年與Katherine de Clifford在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1402年登記服兵役。他於1375年被列為warden of the scottish marches.。他去世於1418年4月6日在英國英格蘭越可爾吉可比 拉文斯沃斯享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Greystoke于1353年10月18日出生在英国越可爾拉文斯沃斯时，他的父亲William Greystoke32岁，母亲Joan Fitzhugh15岁。他于大约1381年与Katherine de Clifford在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1402年登记服兵役。他于1375年被列为warden of the scottish marches.。他去世于1418年4月6日在英国英格兰越可爾吉可比 拉文斯沃斯享年64岁。

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Graystock
meanings: English: locative name, from Greystoke (Cumb), recorded as Graystock in 1291.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Greystoke was born on 18 October 1353, in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, his father, William Greystoke, was 32 and his mother, Joan Fitzhugh, was 15. He married Katherine de Clifford about 1381, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1402. In 1375, his occupation is listed as warden of the scottish marches.. He died on 6 April 1418, in Kirkby Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Greystoke est né le 18 octobre 1353, à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William Greystoke, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Joan Fitzhugh, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Katherine de Clifford environ 1381, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1402. En 1375, sa profession de son indiquée est warden of the scottish marches.. Il est décédé le 6 avril 1418, à Kirkby Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.Kirkby Ravensworth, Yorkshire: Kirkby Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Greystoke am 18. Oktober 1353 in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Greystoke 32 und seine Mutter Joan Fitzhugh 15. Er hat um 1381 in Yorkshire, England Katherine de Clifford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1402 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1375 ist sein Beruf als warden of the scottish marches. aufgeführt. Er starb am 6. April 1418 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Kirkby Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Greystoke è nato il il 18 ottobre 1353 nel Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, William Greystoke, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Joan Fitzhugh, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Katherine de Clifford circa 1381, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1402. Nel 1375, la sua occupazione è indicata come warden of the scottish marches.. Morì il 6 aprile 1418, nel Kirkby Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Greystokeが1353年10月18日にイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスで生まれた時，父William Greystokeは32歳，母Joan Fitzhughは15歳であった。約1381年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでKatherine de Cliffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1402年に兵役登録をした。1375年，職業はwarden of the scottish marches.と記録されている。彼は1418年4月6日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアキルクビー ラベンスウオルスで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Greystoke(이)가 1353년 10월 18일 영국 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Greystoke(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Fitzhugh(은)는 15세였다. 그는 대략 1381년 영국 요르크실르에서 Katherine de Clifford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1402년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1375년, 그의 직업은 warden of the scottish marches.이었다. 그는 1418년 4월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 커크비 레이븐스워스에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Kirkby Ravensworth, Yorkshire: Kirkby Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Greystoke nasceu em 18 de outubro de 1353, em Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Greystoke, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Joan Fitzhugh, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine de Clifford aproximadamente 1381, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1402. Em 1375, sua profissão aparece como warden of the scottish marches.. Ele faleceu em 6 de abril de 1418, em Kirkby Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 64 anos.

ro.Kirkby Ravensworth, Yorkshire: Kirkby Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Greystoke родился 18 октября 1353 г. в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Greystoke было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Fitzhugh, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine de Clifford около 1381 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. В 1402 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1375 годуработал по профессии warden of the scottish marches. Он умер 6 апреля 1418 г. в местности киркби равенсворт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph Greystoke nació el 18 de octubre de 1353, en Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Greystoke, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Joan Fitzhugh, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Katherine de Clifford aproximadamente 1381, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1402. En 1375, su ocupación registrada era warden of the scottish marches.. Murió el 6 de abril de 1418, en Kirkby Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años.
